description: Deploying with YAML Manifests - Hands-On with Declarative Configuration
summary: Deploying with YAML Manifests - Hands-On with Declarative Configuration
target_audience: Absolute beginners to Kubernetes who have a basic familiarity with containers and Docker

lectures.title: Deploying with YAML Manifests - Hands-On with Declarative Configuration
objectives: Understand the difference between imperative and declarative approaches
Write Deployment and Service YAML manifests from scratch
Apply manifests with kubectl apply and verify the results
